description.value: The shot that feels perfect before it leaves the string. You have learned to recognize when it is happening and let it.

system.benefits:
When you make a ranged attack and both dice show the same value and both are successes, gain +1 additional success. This is not a critical hit and does not restore Luck. The following conditions become available on Keen Eye triggered attacks based on margin:

  • Margin 2: Target is Slowed (minor) until end of their next turn
  • Margin 3: Target is Slowed (major) until end of their next turn, or target gains 1 Bleeding stack
